author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Committed 8abe7c01 on fix/hub-sync-hardening: all four option-A fixes implemented and verified (cargo fmt clean, clippy --all-targets -D warnings clean, 1906 lib tests passing including 2 new regression tests for concurrent atomic_write and live-holder lock timeout). rewrite_as_offline caller trace confirmed sequential (not nested) lock acquisition, no restructuring needed. Design doc .design/hub-v3-per-agent-refs.md included in same commit. Awaiting push by user, then PR to develop.
